UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents the user account, plan details, and total storage usage in bytes.

uniqueId.description: The custom formatted immutable member tag (e.g. MARK-7X9K) used for recipient navigation.

storageUsed.description: Amount of bytes currently occupied by uploaded files.

SharedFile.title: SharedFile
SharedFile.description: Information about metadata of uploaded files. The file payload itself is saved in Supabase storage, and this record saves its public download URL.

id.description: Unique identifier for this shared file.

userUniqueId.description: The owner's active member tag (uniqueId) for folder reference.

url.description: The public storage download URL on Supabase.

thumbnail.description: Optional file thumbnail representation or base64 description.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when file record was registered.

expiresAt.description: Null if permanent file, or timestamp of expiration.

downloadsCount.description: Tracking how many times this file has been opened or downloaded.

Collection.title: Collection
Collection.description: Custom grouping or folder created by users to organize files.

userId.description: User authentication ID of the owner.

SystemView.title: SystemView
SystemView.description: Visual or traffic capture analytic tracking visits for stats computation.

fileOwnerId.description: The recipient's owner user authentication ID.

userUniqueId.description: The owner unique ID signature path visited.

viewerIP.description: Track record of client access IP address.

/files/{fileId}.description: Global table mapping all files of different users, with owner index fields.

/collections/{collectionId}.description: Folders created by users to cluster files.

/views/{viewId}.description: Capture logs for view traffic computation.
